commands.review_summary:
Adds `useTempDirTracker()`, migrates three script tests to it, updates the testing guide and helper-routing expectation, and narrows schema union access in one gateway-protocol guard test.

PR surface: Tests +31, Docs -3. Total +28 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a test-helper cleanup rather than a reported runtime bug. The relevant checks are source inspection of current-main temp-dir patterns, helper semantics, and the PR's targeted test/CI evidence.

target.title: test: use auto-cleaning temp dir helper
target.body:
## Summary
- add `useTempDirTracker()` to `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts`, which registers Vitest `afterEach` cleanup automatically
- migrate three script tests from direct `mkdtempSync` temp directory creation to the auto-cleaning helper path
- update the testing guide to recommend `useTempDirTracker()` instead of manual cleanup wiring
- update the test-project routing expectation so `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts` changes include the new helper-backed importers
- fix an unrelated `check-test-types` noise source by narrowing TypeBox union schema access in `native-protocol-levels.guard.test.ts`

## Verification
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/native-protocol-levels.guard.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm tsgo:test`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --base origin/main --head HEAD --json`
- `env PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin:$PATH pnpm exec oxfmt --check docs/help/testing.md packages/gateway-protocol/src/native-protocol-levels.guard.test.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.ts test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/scripts/parallels-package-log-progress-extract.test.ts test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts test/scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
